title: Prism Motor
prompt: Instrumental only. A hypnotic 42-second minimal electronic focus track at 116 BPM with a steady, elegant motorik pulse. Use a soft but firm four-on-the-floor kick, a sparse dry clap or rim, one quietly ticking percussion line, a dark analog sequence, a rounded bass anchor, and wide translucent synth chords. Keep it sleek, spacious, and slightly futuristic: stronger rhythmic propulsion than lo-fi, but never clubby or aggressive. Structure: 0–6 seconds ignition, 6–29 seconds steady propulsion, 29–35 seconds color opening with a second sequence layer, 35–42 seconds reduce back to the core pulse. No vocals, no lo-fi, no Rhodes, no acoustic piano, no vinyl noise, no disco guitar, no EDM drop, no risers, no supersaw, no aggressive compression, no harsh hi-hats.
commercialUseNote: Verify the active ElevenLabs paid-plan music terms before commercial publication.
